  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_customer_sk], aggr=[sum(t.act_sales)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_customer_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuProjectExec
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                  GpuHashJoinExec

                          GpuFilterExec
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=26843545
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([sr_reason_sk@3], 8), input_partitions=8

--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
  GpuSortExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80

          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80

              GpuProjectExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=28, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=28, subtree_max_row_bytes=80

                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=40

                            GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                              GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=80
                        GpuProjectExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=80

                                GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
                                  GpuScanExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
